title: symphysia floccosa
intro: Symphysia floccosa, also known as the bushy tansy, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Symphysia floccosa include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Symphysia floccosa include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
